global_rules.spacing: Dense tactical layouts. Use p-4 to p-6 for mobile containers. Large touch targets (min-h-[48px]) for buttons.
global_rules.borders: Tactical Minimalism. 1px solid borders (border-white/10) instead of soft shadows.
global_rules.motion: Subtle, fast micro-interactions. Active states should have an immediate, crisp 'snap' to mimic hardware buttons.
global_rules.accessibility: High contrast text (text-white for primary, text-zinc-400 for secondary). All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

typography.instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure numerical displays (like Speed or Time Interval) use tabular-nums and the boldest weight for a 'digital stopwatch' feel.

header.style: Sticky top bar, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80, border-b border-white/10. Contains the bilingual toggle and the always-visible BLE Connection Status indicators.
header.connection_status: Small circular icons or pill badges. Green dot = Connected, Red/Zinc dot = Disconnected. Show Machine + up to 3 Pods.

cards.style: Flat backgrounds (bg-[#121212]), rounded-xl, border border-white/10. Inner padding p-5. NO box-shadow.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-lg h-14 w-full flex items-center justify-center transition-colors active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.danger: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-lg h-14 w-full flex items-center justify-center transition-colors active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white/40 text-white rounded-lg h-14 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors

inputs_and_controls.slider: Thick track (h-3), highly visible thumb. Use blue for speed, white/gray for time interval.
inputs_and_controls.toggle: Large touch area. Blue active state for standard features (Vibrator, Pods), Red active state for Heater.
inputs_and_controls.mode_selector: Segmented control style. bg-[#1A1A1A] p-1 rounded-lg border border-white/10.

layout.structure: Mobile-first width constraint (max-w-md mx-auto h-screen flex flex-col relative bg-[#050505] overflow-hidden shadow-2xl).
layout.navigation: Bottom tab bar or clear segmented views for Device Registration vs Main Controls vs Settings.

visual_enhancers.background_texture: Implement a pure CSS subtle grain/noise or a radial gradient (bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-blue-900/10 via-black to-black) to avoid flat black.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Bold weights) for hardware buttons. Technical, crisp aesthetic.
visual_enhancers.animations: Use Framer Motion. Add a radar/pulse ping animation for the 'Scanning for BLE devices' state.

main.usage: Use in the Splash screen, Header, or Device Registration screen. Since it has a black background, it will blend perfectly with the #050505 base background.

features_spec.ble_scanner: List layout for discovered devices (JDY-23/08/32). Each row should have a 'Connect/Register' button. Assign roles (Machine, Pod 1, 2, 3) via a simple dropdown or cyclic tap.

training_controls.time_interval: Display range 0.1s to 10.0s. Use a large slider or prominent +/- steppers.
training_controls.speed: Display range 0-10. Use a vertical slider or a prominent rotary-style UI, but standard thick sliders are safest.
training_controls.action_buttons: Cluster the 'Speed' (motors start), 'Launch', and 'Init' (start training) buttons prominently. 'Init' should be the largest primary CTA.

features_spec.bilingual: Include an EN/ES toggle in the Header or Settings. Keep text strings short to accommodate translation expansion.
